My daughter doesn’t seem too interested in playing this after I paid $20 for it but I think that there’s just so many others that she prefers right now I tried playing this and had such a difficult time I gave up, but I do see the potential and only don’t recommend this to new players younger players and maybe just recommend to wait until the price tag gets cheaper and the developmental stages & bugs are worked out

Is there something am doing wrong or is the achievement just bugged.

reviews.review_description: The game was one of the most fun interactive sandbox games I’ve got on my App Library but if you play for to long in one sitting it can get boring but the game will definitely allow you to come back to play many times in one week it’s one of those games you have to play everyday or at least 3 times a week 4/5 in other words 9/10.

reviews.review_description: Today I downloaded this game and I put on my headset. I played the game for a couple hours, ( it was fantastic ) and then I shut my headset down and went to bed. In the morning I woke up to the sound of Kanye West’s “Onsight” playing in my head and I realized I turned into a baby. 10/10 would baby again.

developer_response.body: Haha! That's hilarious! Thanks so much for the great review!

reviews.review_description: Whenever I got the game and started playing with her up I realized every time I go back in the game there's always a glitch where I get stuck in the floor and I have to restart the whole game.

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear you are experiencing an issue! You can reset the height by pressing Y+B at the same time. We hope you enjoy the game, and hope you'll consider raising your review to 5-stars!:)

reviews.review_description: This might just be an issue with my Oculus but this game just will not open nor run at all, the one time I got it going it crashed in like 2 minutes. So in simple terms $20 was spent for nothing 🤷‍♂️

developer_response.body: We are so sorry to hear that you are having an issue with your device! Possibly other applications or websites running in the background? We would be happy to help you troubleshoot, and get it working! We care deeply for every person who buys out games! Please reach out on our Discord, or email contact@chickenwaffle.com

reviews.review_title: A lot of fun but has issues
reviews.review_description: This game is actually a lot of fun however I've been having some problems with how the camera is so close to the ground (I understand your supposed to use your hands to move but it's really annoying) also sometimes when I try to recenter my screen goes under the ground. Also I'd prefer an option to move normally since it gets annoying after a while.

After you finish all these puzzles there's nothing to do and the game isn't really worth the price right now. After I finished the 4 puzzles and opened the diary, nothing ever happened. It could only ever get fun if a good mod came out improve and add more. For now it's super boring.

reviews.review_title: WHY ISNT IT ALLOWING ME TO DOWNLOAD
reviews.review_description: I literally downloaded this game and can't play it. PLZ HELP

developer_response.body:
So sorry you are having issues downloading! There was an issue with the Oculus store that blocked users from downloading apps! We hope it works now! Please reach out to contact@chickenwaffle.com with any questions or feedback! We are happy to help you troubleshoot, and we value you as a fan!:) 
..and we hope that we can convince you to change your review to 5 stars!

reviews.review_description:
In this video - https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=v-5q5Zx7n3E

A sandbox experience filled with things to do and a few more complex secrets to work towards unlocking (the extra game cartridge for example). It is likely a title that most will play for an hour or 2 for a laugh and don't return but for the right person or right kid I could see this being something they cant put down. Maybe a bit expensive but I felt like I got what I paid out of it.

developer_response.body: Thanks for sharing! Great review!

reviews.review_description: as a casual vr user it was a fine game not the best ever but not bad i would recommend

developer_response.body: Happy to hear you enjoyed the game! Please reach out on our discord or email with any ideas or recommendations! We love to hear feedback from players, and we hope you'll consider raising your review to 5 stars!:)

reviews.review_title: Happy to have stumbled across for Quest2
reviews.review_description: Didn’t know this was available for the Quest 2 until I stumbled across it while stuck in a worm hole on the internet ...well that worm hole led me to SideQuestVR.com and that’s where I finally tracked down the entertaining creation of “Baby Hands” ...the game that my son had watched YouTubers play a million times...the game that looked entertaining to get lost in myself...and I have not been disappointed... even in Beta!! Keep up the good work Chicken Waffle and Company...

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the great review! It's amazing to hear fans loving the game! ..hopefully we can convince you to squeeze out that extra 5th star! lol:)
